notes: Focused LongMemEval rescue gate for candidate-generation misses mined from branch diagnostics.
This gate is separate from the five-suite release gate and is intended for fast recall-regression checks while iterating on long-horizon storage and retrieval.

The first three cases lock the status-cue and completion-expansion fix; q-gpt4_7f6b06db is intentionally not locked yet because it remains a ranking/pool-depth miss after candidate generation succeeds.
